title: neolitsea mollissima
intro: Neolitsea mollissima, also known as the velvet tree or soft-leaf neolitsea, is a plant species native to Southeast Asia, belonging to the family Lauraceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, which have been attributed to its essential oil composition. The health benefits of Neolitsea mollissima include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas and infusions, which can be made by steeping its leaves in hot water, and essential oils that can be extracted through steam distillation.
